display_text: Mirana Aghanim's Scepter: Causes Sacred Arrow to release Starstorm along its path and upon impact. This upgrade counters grouped enemy formations by adding AoE damage to Sacred Arrow, making it a powerful anti-clustering tool during team fights and skirmishes.
search_text: Mirana Aghanim Scepter anti-clustering Sacred Arrow Starstorm AoE damage team fight

display_text: Mirana Aghanim's Shard: Grants +1 Leap charge and critical strikes during Leap. This upgrade counters kiting and evasion mechanics by enhancing Mirana's mobility and burst damage potential, transforming her into a more reliable physical damage dealer in skirmishes.
search_text: Mirana Aghanim Shard Leap critical strike mobility anti-kiting burst damage
